holdings.infoBox: PBD is an equity ETF with a total of 124 individual holdings. The top holdings are Voltronic Power Technology stock at 1.29%, Phihong Technology at 1.19%, SolarEdge Technologies at 1.17%, Toyo Tanso at 1.17%, and AcBel Polytech at 1.13%.

overview.description: The Invesco Global Clean Energy ETF (PBD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of companies that focus on cleaner energy, weighted equally in tiers. PBD was launched on Jun 13, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
